news.t: AMD Ascent Could Lure Traders to This ETF
Direxion Unveils AMD Single Stock Leveraged and Inverse ETFs

holdings.infoBox: AMUU is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 32.62%, Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 21.46%, Amd Shares Swap at 20.01%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 15.68%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 13.53%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily AMD Bull 2X ETF (AMUU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of AMD stock. AMUU was launched on Feb 12, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.
